Term Sheet for Series B Funding

Issuer: Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345A)
Investor: Stellar Ventures LLP
Total Investment: SGD 5,000,000
Valuation: Pre-money valuation of SGD 25,000,000
Shares to be Issued: 1,000,000 Series B Preferred Shares
Lead Investor Contact: Dr. Jonathan Lim (NRIC: S2345678B)
Board Seat: Investor shall have the right to appoint one board member
Contact Email: jonathan.lim@stellar.sg
Contact Phone: +65 9123 4567
Closing Date: On or before 31st December 2023
Terms of Liquidation: 1.5x non-participating preferred
Use of Funds: Primarily for R&D and market expansion in Southeast Asia

This term sheet is intended for discussion purposes only and is not legally binding.
